content.title: The High Republic: Path of Deceit
content.author: Justina Ireland & Tessa Gratton
content.description: Set 150 years before the height of the High Republic era, a Jedi Padawan and a member of the mysterious Path of the Open Hand are thrown together on a world at the edge of the galaxy, where a dangerous secret forces them each to question their deepest loyalties.

content.title: The High Republic: Convergence
content.author: Zoraida Córdova
content.description: On the planet Eiram, two noble houses have warred for generations — but an arranged marriage is brokered to end the conflict. When an assassination attempt threatens the peace, a young Jedi must uncover the truth before the fragile truce collapses.

content.title: The High Republic: Cataclysm
content.author: Lydia Kang
content.description: In the aftermath of Eiram and E'ronoh's brief peace, a dangerous Path of the Open Hand cult ignites old wounds and new crises — forcing Jedi and their allies to confront a galaxy on the edge of catastrophe.

content.title: The High Republic: Path of Vengeance
content.author: Cavan Scott
content.description: The Path of the Open Hand's grip on the galaxy tightens as two young women — one a Jedi, one a true believer in the Path — are drawn into a collision course that will test everything they know about loyalty, faith, and the Force.

content.title: The High Republic: Light of the Jedi
content.author: Charles Soule
content.description: At the height of the Republic's golden age, a catastrophic disaster in hyperspace throws the Jedi Order into a desperate rescue operation — and reveals a terrifying new threat lurking in the darkness between the stars.

content.title: The High Republic: Into the Dark
content.author: Claudia Gray
content.description: A Jedi Padawan and a crew of smugglers become stranded at a derelict space station after a hyperspace disaster — and what they find there may be more dangerous than anything waiting in the dark outside.

content.title: Young Jedi Adventures Shorts
content.description: A series of bite-sized animated shorts set in the same High Republic world as Young Jedi Adventures, following Kai, Lys, and Nubs on quick missions and fun encounters around Tenoo.

content.title: Young Jedi Adventures

episodes.title: Nash's Race Day / The Lost Jedi Ship
Get Well Nubs / The Junk Giant
Lys and the Snowy Mountain Rescue / Attack of the Training Droids
The Jedi and the Thief / The Missing Kibbin
The Girl and Her Gargantua / The Show Must Go On
The Princess and the Jedi / Kai's Bad Day
Visitor's Day / The Growing Green Danger
Off the Rails / The Thieves of Tharnaka
An Adventure with Yoda / The Talon Takeover
Mystery of the Opal Cave / Clash
Stuck in the Muck / Junkyard Sleepover
The Great Leaf Glide / The Harvest Feast
The Tale of the Short Spire / The Team Up
The Caves of Batuu / Finders Keepers
The Starship Show / Nash's Super Busy Day
Heroes and Hotshots / A Jedi or a Pirate
The Rustler Roundup / A New Discovery
A Pirate's Pet / The Secret Ship
Nubs' Big Mistake / The Jedi Rescue
Terror of Tenoo / The Prince of Masks
Mine and Ours / The Andraven Circuit
The Great Gomgourd Quest / A Sticky Situation
The Missing Life Day Feast / The Lost Treasure of Tenoo
The Wild Aklyrr / Lys' Lost Lightsaber
Just Like Wes / Raxlo to the Rescue
The Helpful Harvester / Lost Little Droid
The Firehawk Feud / The Chop Shop Calamity
Big Pooba Problems / Best Bounty Buddies
Journey to the Bracca Badlands / The Search for the Missing Dunnels
The Spaceport Setback / The Mission Mixup
A Mission to Remember / The Bounty Hunter and the Thief
The New Droid Friends / Batuu Bonanza
Music Mayhem / The Night Lights of Tenoo
Journey to the Bottom of Naboo / Speeder Surprise
Scrapping for a Song / Bell and the Band
To Do Good / Nubs and the Bumbling Bandits

content.description: An animated series following a group of young Jedi younglings as they learn the ways of the Force, go on adventures across the galaxy, and discover what it means to be a Jedi.

content.title: Young Jedi Adventures: Galactic Training
content.description: An educational mobile game based on the animated series Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures, featuring mini-games and activities designed to teach young players the ways of the Jedi.

content.title: Fun with Nubs
content.description: A series of one-minute animated shorts following the loveable Nubs and his droid companion RJ-83 through small, charming everyday adventures on Tenoo.

content.title: The High Republic: The Rising Storm
content.author: Cavan Scott
content.description: As the Republic Fair celebrates the galaxy's unity, the Nihil strike in their most audacious and devastating attack yet — plunging the Jedi into a desperate fight to protect the innocent and hold back the storm.

content.title: The High Republic: Out of the Shadows
content.author: Justina Ireland
content.description: A Jedi Knight investigating a mysterious hyperspace disaster is pulled into a web of political intrigue and buried secrets — while the shadow of the Nihil continues to fall across the Outer Rim.

content.title: The High Republic: The Fallen Star
content.author: Claudia Gray
content.description: The Nihil launch their most devastating strike at the heart of the High Republic — attacking Starlight Beacon itself, turning the galaxy's greatest symbol of hope into a desperate fight for survival.

content.title: The High Republic: Midnight Horizon
content.author: Daniel José Older
content.description: Two young Jedi arrive on the cosmopolitan city-world of Corellia to investigate a Nihil plot — navigating an underworld of crime and corruption while the fate of the Republic hangs in the balance.

content.title: The High Republic: The Eye of Darkness
content.author: George Mann
content.description: Years after the fall of Starlight Beacon, the galaxy has been cut off from the Republic by the Nihil's Stormwall. Now the Jedi must find a way to strike back against the darkness — from within.

content.title: The High Republic: Defy the Storm
content.author: Justina Ireland & Tessa Gratton
content.description: With the Nihil's Stormwall isolating the Outer Rim, a group of Jedi and their allies must push beyond its deadly barrier — risking everything on a daring mission to reach those trapped inside.

content.title: The High Republic: Temptation of the Force
content.author: Tessa Gratton
content.description: As the Jedi work to dismantle the Nihil from within the Stormwall, a Jedi Knight is drawn toward a seductive and dangerous philosophy — one that could save lives or shatter everything the Order stands for.

content.title: The High Republic: Tears of the Nameless
content.author: George Mann
content.description: A young Jedi investigates a mysterious signal emanating from deep within Nihil-held space — uncovering a secret that could change the course of the war and the understanding of the Force itself.

content.title: The High Republic: Into the Light
content.author: Claudia Gray
content.description: In the final days of the High Republic Era, a Jedi searches for hope amid the wreckage of war — confronting the darkness that has settled over the galaxy and the light she still believes can prevail.

content.title: The High Republic: Trials of the Jedi
content.author: Charles Soule
content.description: As the conflict with the Nihil reaches its climax, the Jedi Order faces a reckoning — tested in ways that will determine not just the outcome of the war, but the future of the Order itself.

content.title: The Acolyte: Wayseeker
content.author: Justina Ireland
content.description: Set two centuries after the High Republic's golden age, a Jedi on the fringes of the Order follows a trail of dark side energy through a galaxy grown complacent — and discovers a threat the Order is not prepared to face.

content.title: The Acolyte
content.description: Set during the twilight of the High Republic era, a former Padawan and her Jedi pursuers are drawn into a web of secrets connecting a series of shocking crimes to a powerful figure from the past.

content.title: Padawan
content.author: Kiersten White
content.description: A restless young Obi-Wan Kenobi runs away from his master on an unsanctioned mission — and finds himself stranded on a mysterious planet where he must figure out what kind of Jedi, and what kind of person, he wants to be.

content.title: Master & Apprentice
content.author: Claudia Gray
content.description: Qui-Gon Jinn and a young Obi-Wan Kenobi travel to a planet on the verge of civil war — where an unexpected prophecy and a difficult decision will test the bonds between master and apprentice.

content.title: The Living Force
content.author: John Jackson Miller
content.description: One year before the Battle of Naboo, the entire Jedi Council travels to the Outer Rim world of Kwenn — a routine trip that becomes anything but, as the Jedi confront questions about their place in the galaxy and the living Force itself.

content.title: Zen – Grogu and Dust Bunnies
content.description: A wordless, meditative short produced in collaboration with Studio Ghibli, following Grogu as he encounters playful dust bunny spirits in a moment of quiet wonder.

content.title: Episode I – The Phantom Menace
content.description: Two Jedi knights escort a young queen through a political crisis and discover a slave boy with an extraordinary connection to the Force — one that could fulfil an ancient Jedi prophecy.

content.title: Journeys: The Phantom Menace
content.description: An interactive retelling of Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace, combining motion comic-style visuals with mini-games and collectibles to guide players through the events of the film.

content.title: Journeys: Beginnings
content.description: A prequel companion to Star Wars Journeys: The Phantom Menace, exploring the early life of Anakin Skywalker and the events on Tatooine leading up to the Boonta Eve Classic podrace.

content.title: Queen's Peril
content.author: E.K. Johnston
content.description: The untold story of how Padmé Amidala became Queen of Naboo — and how she assembled the handmaidens who would stand beside her, forging bonds of loyalty and friendship in the shadow of an invasion.

content.title: Mace Windu: The Glass Abyss
content.author: Steven Barnes
content.description: In the days after Qui-Gon Jinn's funeral, Mace Windu travels to a remote world haunted by dark-side energy — leading a perilous mission that forces him to confront questions about the Force, leadership, and the nature of evil.

content.title: Queen's Shadow
content.author: E.K. Johnston
content.description: Padmé Amidala's reign as Queen ends, and she takes her place in the Galactic Senate — navigating a treacherous political world with the help of her loyal handmaidens as she finds her voice as a senator.

content.title: Episode II – Attack of the Clones
content.description: A young Jedi is assigned to protect a senator whose life is under threat, while his investigation and a separate mission by his mentor reveal a conspiracy that will drag the Republic into war.

content.title: Queen's Hope
content.author: E.K. Johnston
content.description: As the Clone Wars begin, Padmé Amidala confronts the cost of the conflict she tried to prevent — while a secret ceremony, lasting promises, and her deepest convictions are tested by a galaxy at war.

content.title: Brotherhood
content.author: Mike Chen
content.description: In the earliest days of the Clone Wars, Obi-Wan Kenobi is dispatched to Cato Neimoidia to investigate a bombing — while Anakin Skywalker, now a Jedi Knight on his own for the first time, must prove himself without his master.

content.title: The Clone Wars
content.description: Anakin Skywalker and his newly assigned Padawan embark on a dangerous mission behind enemy lines to rescue a young hostage, testing the new partnership before the full heat of the Clone Wars.

content.title: The Clone Wars

episodes.title: A Sunny Day in the Void
The Jedi Who Knew Too Much

content.description: An animated anthology series expanding the Clone Wars across seven seasons, following Anakin, Obi-Wan, Ahsoka, and countless others through the battles, politics, and moral complexities of a galaxy at war.

content.title: Tales of the Jedi
content.description: A collection of animated short stories exploring pivotal and unseen moments in the lives of Ahsoka Tano and Count Dooku, tracing the diverging paths that led each of them to their destiny.

content.title: Dark Disciple
content.author: Christie Golden
content.description: Based on unproduced Clone Wars scripts, an unlikely partnership forms between a Jedi Master and former Sith assassin Asajj Ventress — tasked with a mission to eliminate Count Dooku before more lives are lost to the war.

content.title: Thrawn Ascendancy: Chaos Rising
content.author: Timothy Zahn
content.description: In the Unknown Regions of the galaxy, the Chiss Ascendancy faces a mysterious enemy unlike any they have encountered before — and a young military officer named Thrawn begins his rise through the ranks.

content.title: Thrawn Ascendancy: Greater Good
content.author: Timothy Zahn
content.description: Thrawn continues to defend the Chiss Ascendancy against unseen threats in the Unknown Regions — but political enemies within the Ascendancy itself may prove more dangerous than any foe beyond its borders.

content.title: Episode III – Revenge of the Sith
content.description: As the Clone Wars reach their bloody conclusion, a conflicted Jedi hero is pulled toward the dark side by fear of loss, setting in motion a tragedy that will extinguish the Jedi Order and reshape the galaxy.

content.title: Master of Evil
content.author: Adam Christopher
content.description: In the immediate aftermath of Order 66, Darth Vader is dispatched to a remote world to investigate rumors of a Force-wielding shaman — a mission that forces the new Sith Lord to confront the cost of absolute power.

content.title: The Bad Batch
content.description: A squad of elite clone soldiers with experimental mutations find themselves at odds with the new Empire in the immediate aftermath of the Clone Wars, questioning their identity and searching for a place in a changed galaxy.

content.title: Inquisitor: Rise of the Red Blade
content.author: Delilah S. Dawson
content.description: The secret origin of the Inquisitorius — following a Jedi who survived Order 66 and is broken, reshaped, and reforged into one of the Emperor's most dangerous dark-side hunters.

content.title: Sanctuary: A Bad Batch Novel
content.author: Lamar Giles
content.description: Set during the earliest days of the Empire, Clone Force 99 takes a mission that goes wrong on a world caught between Imperial control and desperate resistance — forcing the Bad Batch to choose who they protect.

content.title: Thrawn Ascendancy: Lesser Evil
content.author: Timothy Zahn
content.description: The Chiss Ascendancy is fracturing from within as rival families conspire for power — and Thrawn must navigate a treacherous political crisis in the Unknown Regions while a greater threat looms beyond.

content.title: Ahsoka
content.author: E.K. Johnston
content.description: One year after Order 66, Ahsoka Tano is living in hiding — until she is drawn into a conflict on a farming moon that forces her to pick up her lightsabers again and choose what she stands for in a galaxy without the Jedi.

content.title: Catalyst: A Rogue One Novel
content.author: James Luceno
content.description: The secret origin of the Death Star — how a brilliant scientist and his family are drawn into the Empire's most terrifying weapons program, and how a decades-long friendship becomes the first crack in the armor of the Empire.

content.title: Lords of the Sith
content.author: Paul S. Kemp
content.description: Darth Vader and Emperor Palpatine are ambushed and stranded on the hostile world of Ryloth — and must fight their way through a rebel insurgency together, revealing the brutal dynamic between master and apprentice.

content.title: Tarkin
content.author: James Luceno
content.description: The definitive portrait of Wilhuff Tarkin — tracing his ruthless rise through the Empire's ranks and exploring the ideology that shaped the man who would command the Death Star.

content.title: Jedi: Fallen Order
content.description: Set five years after Order 66, Fallen Order follows Cal Kestis, a young Padawan-turned-fugitive surviving as a scrapper on Bracca. When his Force abilities are exposed, he must outrun the Empire's Inquisitors while attempting to rebuild the Jedi Order.

content.title: Tales of the Empire
content.description: An animated anthology series revealing untold stories from the age of the Empire, following characters forced to make defining choices under the crushing weight of Imperial rule.

content.title: Maul – Shadow Lord
content.description: Tracing the rise of Maul as a crime lord in the galaxy's underworld following the Clone Wars, as he builds a criminal empire and consolidates power from the shadows.

content.title: Tales of the Underworld
content.description: An anthology series exploring the criminal underworld of the Star Wars galaxy, following rogues, smugglers, and outlaws navigating danger and moral ambiguity on the fringes of society.

content.title: Most Wanted
content.author: Rae Carson
content.description: Before the events of Solo, a young Han and Qi'ra are low-level street scrumrats on Corellia — until a botched job thrusts them into the crosshairs of two rival crime syndicates and forces them to rely on each other.

content.title: Crimson Climb
content.author: E.K. Johnston
content.description: After the events of Solo, Qi'ra survives within the brutal ranks of Crimson Dawn — climbing through its hierarchy with cunning and ruthlessness, shaping the woman she is becoming in the galaxy's underworld.

content.title: A New Dawn
content.author: John Jackson Miller
content.description: A cynical former Jedi and an idealistic rebel cross paths on an Imperial-controlled mining world — setting in motion events that will bring Kanan Jarrus and Hera Syndulla together and kindle the spark of rebellion.

content.title: Solo
content.description: The early adventures of Han Solo, from his escape off a grim homeworld to his first brush with the criminal underworld — including a fateful heist, a legendary ship, and a lifelong co-pilot.

content.title: Solo (Expanded Edition)
content.author: Mur Lafferty
content.description: The novelization of Solo: A Star Wars Story — expanding on Han's early adventures, the Kessel Run, and the crew of the Millennium Falcon with additional scenes and deeper character moments.

content.title: Beyond Victory — A Mixed Reality Playset
content.description: A mixed reality playset blending the thrilling world of podracing with an original story. Players follow aspiring podracer Volo, whose life is upended under the mentorship of the infamous Sebulba. Features Adventure, Arcade, and Playset modes.

content.title: Obi-Wan Kenobi
content.description: A haunted and diminished Obi-Wan Kenobi is pulled out of his lonely desert exile ten years after the fall of the Jedi, forced to confront enemies from his past on a mission that tests everything he has left.

content.title: Jedi: Survivor
content.description: Five years after Fallen Order, Cal Kestis is the last Jedi standing between the Empire and the dawn of a new hope. On the run with the crew of the Mantis, Cal discovers a mysterious portal that could change the fate of the galaxy.

content.title: Andor
content.description: A ground-level, espionage-driven prequel to Rogue One following Cassian Andor's gradual radicalisation — tracing how an ordinary man becomes a committed revolutionary against the Empire's suffocating machinery.

content.title: Rebels Shorts
content.description: Four short animated vignettes released ahead of the Rebels premiere, introducing the crew of the Ghost as they clash with Imperial forces and cross paths with a street kid named Ezra Bridger.

content.title: Rebels

episodes.title: In the Name of the Rebellion

content.description: Years before the Battle of Yavin, a scrappy crew of misfits aboard a small freighter plants seeds of rebellion in an occupied system, slowly connecting with a larger resistance and guiding a teenager with a rare gift in the Force.

content.title: Rebels: Ghost Raid
content.description: A browser game set during the early days of the Spectres crew, in which players help defend the Ghost from Imperial attack.

content.title: Rebels: Rebel Strike
content.description: A turn-based strategy browser game in which players command the Spectres through tactical missions against Imperial forces.

content.title: Rebels: Chopper Chase
content.description: A browser game centred on the Ghost's irascible astromech droid Chopper, navigating obstacles and Imperial hazards.

content.title: Rebels: Team Tactics
content.description: An arcade browser game loosely adapting the Siege of Lothal, putting the Spectres crew up against Imperial forces on Lothal's capital.

content.title: Rebels: Recon Missions
content.description: A side-scrolling platformer mobile game set in the Star Wars Rebels universe, in which players control Ezra Bridger on missions against the Galactic Empire across multiple levels and environments.

content.title: Rebels: Imperial Heist
content.description: An endless-runner browser game set during the Rebels era, in which players navigate Imperial-controlled territory as a member of the growing rebellion.

content.title: Rebels: Strike Missions
content.description: A browser game featuring the Season 2 cast of Rebels, sending players on combat missions against the Empire across a variety of dangerous locales.

content.title: Rebels: Special Ops
content.description: A browser game using characters and elements from Rebels, tasking players with covert special operations missions alongside the crew of the Ghost.

content.title: Leia, Princess of Alderaan
content.author: Claudia Gray
content.description: At sixteen, Leia Organa must prove herself worthy of the Alderaanian throne through acts of courage and service — while quietly uncovering the Rebellion her parents have been secretly building, and choosing her own path.

content.title: Thrawn
content.author: Timothy Zahn
content.description: The story of how the alien tactician Thrawn rose through the Imperial ranks — told through his own eyes and those of a young Imperial officer caught in his orbit, as Thrawn dissects enemies through art, culture, and cold genius.

content.title: Thrawn: Alliances
content.author: Timothy Zahn
content.description: Darth Vader and Thrawn are sent on a joint mission to the Unknown Regions — a mission that parallels an earlier encounter between Anakin Skywalker and Thrawn during the Clone Wars, revealing the complicated history between them.

content.title: Thrawn: Treason
content.author: Timothy Zahn
content.description: Thrawn is ordered to prove the value of his TIE Defender project against the Death Star program — a political battle that sends him on a mission into the Unknown Regions and forces him to choose between loyalty and principle.

content.title: Rebel Rising
content.author: Beth Revis
content.description: Filling in the years between Rogue One's prologue and its main story — Jyn Erso's life after being abandoned by Saw Gerrera, the hardships that shaped her, and the long road that brought her to the Rebellion.

content.title: Rogue One
content.description: A band of rebels with little to lose band together on a desperate, unsanctioned mission to steal the plans for the Empire's planet-killing superweapon — a mission the galaxy cannot afford to fail.

content.title: Rogue One: Boots on the Ground
content.description: A browser companion game released alongside Rogue One, drawing on the film's characters and events to put players in the thick of the Rebel assault to steal the Death Star plans.

content.title: Vader Immortal — Episode I
content.description: The first chapter of an immersive VR trilogy. Players are smugglers captured by Darth Vader and brought to his fortress on Mustafar, where an ancient secret connected to a power greater than the Force awaits.

content.title: Vader Immortal — Episode II
content.description: In the second chapter of the Vader Immortal trilogy, the mystery of Mustafar deepens as players learn the true nature of Vader's obsession with the ancient Bright Star artifact.

content.title: Vader Immortal — Episode III
content.description: The thrilling conclusion to the Vader Immortal trilogy. Players must face Darth Vader himself in a final confrontation deep within the Mustafar fortress as the fate of the Bright Star is decided.

content.title: Battlefront
content.description: An action shooter set across iconic original trilogy battlegrounds including Hoth, Endor, and Sullust. Players fight as soldiers of the Rebel Alliance or the Galactic Empire in large-scale multiplayer battles.

content.title: Episode IV – A New Hope
content.description: A young man's ordinary life on a remote desert planet is upended when he joins a smuggler, an old hermit, and a desperate princess in a mission to destroy the Empire's most fearsome weapon.

content.title: Heroes Path
content.description: A puzzle game in which players guide iconic Star Wars heroes through increasingly complex maze-based levels, unlocking new characters from across the saga as they progress.

content.title: Commander
content.description: A base-building real-time strategy game in which players choose to fight for the Galactic Empire or the Rebel Alliance, constructing and defending bases while deploying troops in battles across the galaxy.

content.title: Heir to the Jedi
content.author: Kevin Hearne
content.description: Luke Skywalker takes on a solo mission for the Rebellion to rescue a valued slicer from Imperial captivity — and begins his first tentative steps toward understanding the Force without a master to guide him.

content.title: Episode V – The Empire Strikes Back
content.description: The Empire launches a devastating counter-offensive against the Rebel Alliance. While the rebels flee across the galaxy, a young Jedi seeks out a legendary master to complete his training — and learns a truth that changes everything.

content.title: Yoda's Jedi Training
content.description: A browser game loosely adapting events from The Empire Strikes Back, in which players undergo lightsaber training under Yoda's guidance on the swamp planet Dagobah.

content.title: Battlefront: Twilight Company
content.author: Alexander Freed
content.description: A ground-level view of the Galactic Civil War through the eyes of the 61st Mobile Infantry — soldiers, refugees, and deserters — as Twilight Company fights a brutal campaign across multiple worlds with no end in sight.

content.title: Outlaws
content.description: Set in the period between The Empire Strikes Back and Return of the Jedi, Outlaws follows Kay Vess, a young scoundrel, and her companion Nix as they attempt to pull off the biggest heist in the Outer Rim — getting tangled up with the galaxy's most dangerous crime syndicates.

content.title: Episode VI – Return of the Jedi
content.description: The Rebel Alliance rallies for a final strike against the Empire's new superweapon, while a young Jedi Knight faces his greatest test: convincing his father to return from the dark side before it is too late.

content.title: Uprising
content.description: An action RPG set in the immediate aftermath of the Battle of Endor, following a new hero fighting against Imperial remnants blockading the Anoat sector as news of the Emperor's death spreads.

content.title: Squadrons
content.description: An immersive starfighter combat game set in the aftermath of the Battle of Endor. Experience both sides of the conflict in a single-player campaign following New Republic pilot Vanguard Squadron and Imperial pilot Titan Squadron.

content.title: Battlefront II
content.description: Featuring a canonical single-player story following Imperial special forces commander Iden Versio from the Battle of Endor through the fall of the Empire, plus multiplayer battles spanning all eras — from the Clone Wars to the rise of the First Order.

content.title: The Princess and the Scoundrel
content.author: Beth Revis
content.description: In the immediate aftermath of the Battle of Endor, Leia and Han take a brief honeymoon aboard an Imperial luxury liner — only to discover the Empire is far from finished, and their first days of peace may be their last.

content.title: Squadrons – Hunted
content.description: A lone TIE fighter pilot separated from his squadron must outmaneuver New Republic forces in a desperate bid to survive after the fall of the Empire.

content.title: Alphabet Squadron
content.author: Alexander Freed
content.description: In the chaos following the Emperor's death, a New Republic Intelligence officer assembles a ragtag squadron of misfit pilots — each haunted by their own past — and points them at a deadly Imperial shadow wing that refuses to surrender.

content.title: Aftermath
content.author: Chuck Wendig
content.description: In the weeks after the Battle of Endor, Imperial remnants plot their next move on the planet Akiva — as a New Republic pilot, a bounty hunter, a former Imperial loyalty officer, and a teenage rebel collide in a fight for the galaxy's future.

content.title: Aftermath: Life Debt
content.author: Chuck Wendig
content.description: Han Solo goes rogue to liberate Wookiee slaves on Kashyyyk — drawing Norra Wexley and her crew into a mission that puts them on a collision course with one of the Empire's most dangerous surviving leaders.

content.title: Alphabet Squadron: Shadow Fall
content.author: Alexander Freed
content.description: Alphabet Squadron hunts the last remnants of the 204th Imperial Fighter Wing into the outer reaches of the galaxy — but the quarry is more dangerous than ever, and the hunters are fracturing from within.

content.title: Alphabet Squadron: Victory's Price
content.author: Alexander Freed
content.description: The final confrontation between Alphabet Squadron and the 204th approaches — but victory will demand a cost none of them anticipated, and the end of the war may not look like the one any of them imagined.

content.title: Aftermath: Empire's End
content.author: Chuck Wendig
content.description: The Galactic Civil War reaches its conclusion at the Battle of Jakku — as Norra Wexley and her crew, Admiral Rae Sloane, and the last of the Imperial fleet converge for a final reckoning that will determine the galaxy's fate.

content.title: Lost Stars
content.author: Claudia Gray
content.description: Two childhood friends from a backwater planet both join the Empire — one becomes a TIE pilot, the other eventually defects to the Rebellion — as their opposing paths and enduring bond trace the entire arc of the Galactic Civil War.

content.title: Last Shot
content.author: Daniel José Older
content.description: A dual-timeline thriller following Han Solo and Lando Calrissian — jumping between their wild younger days and the early years of the New Republic — as they hunt a dangerous criminal tied to a weapon capable of terrible destruction.

content.title: The Mandalorian
content.description: A solitary bounty hunter operating far from the reach of the New Republic takes a job with an unusual payload — a mysterious child he cannot bring himself to hand over — and becomes an unlikely guardian.

content.title: The Book of Boba Fett

episodes.title: Chapter 1: Stranger in a Strange Land
Chapter 3: The Streets of Mos Espa
Chapter 6: From the Desert Comes a Stranger
Chapter 7: In the Name of Honor

content.description: The notorious bounty hunter Boba Fett returns to Tatooine to claim the territory once ruled by Jabba the Hutt, confronting rival crime factions and old enemies as he attempts to rule through respect rather than fear.

content.title: Hunters
content.description: Set in the New Republic era after the fall of the Empire, Hunters is a competitive arena combat game where warriors from across the galaxy battle in the ruins of repurposed Imperial arenas on the planet Vespaara.

content.title: Grogu: Cutest in the Galaxy
content.description: A series of bite-sized animated shorts featuring Grogu in playful, wordless vignettes full of charm and mischief, tied to the New Republic era.

content.title: The Mandalorian and Grogu
content.description: Din Djarin and Grogu face a new chapter of their journey together, drawn into dangers that test the bond between the Mandalorian warrior and the child he has sworn to protect.

content.title: Ahsoka

episodes.title: Part Eight: The Jedi, the Witch, and the Warlord

content.description: Ahsoka Tano pursues a trail of clues pointing to the return of a dangerous Imperial threat, while reckoning with her own past and the fractured relationship with a former apprentice who has chosen a different path.

content.title: Skeleton Crew

episodes.title: This Could Be a Real Adventure
Way, Way Out Past the Barrier
Very Interesting, as an Astrogation Problem
Can't Say I Remember No At Attin
You Have a Lot to Learn About Pirates
We're Gonna Be in So Much Trouble

content.description: Four kids from a peaceful, isolated planet stumble into the wider galaxy by accident and find themselves completely out of their depth — stranded in a lawless corner of space with only a mysterious stranger to guide them home.

content.title: Poe Dameron: Free Fall
content.author: Alex Segura
content.description: Long before becoming the Resistance's greatest pilot, a teenage Poe Dameron runs away from home and falls in with a crew of spice runners — learning hard lessons about loyalty, consequence, and who he wants to become.

content.title: Shadow of the Sith
content.author: Adam Christopher
content.description: Luke Skywalker and Lando Calrissian search for a family hiding from the Sith — following a trail of dark-side breadcrumbs that leads toward Exegol and fills in the untold history behind the events of The Rise of Skywalker.

content.title: Bloodline
content.author: Claudia Gray
content.description: Six years before the rise of the First Order, Senator Leia Organa navigates a fractured New Republic Senate while a conspiracy threatens to tear the galaxy apart — and forces her to confront a truth that will change everything.

content.title: Force Collector
content.author: Kevin Shinick
content.description: A teenage boy with the ability to sense Force echoes in old objects embarks on a road trip through the galaxy — uncovering relics and stories from the Jedi Order's past as the First Order's shadow begins to fall.

content.title: Phasma
content.author: Delilah S. Dawson
content.description: The origin story of Captain Phasma — a tale of brutal survival on a harsh world, ruthless ambition, and the cold pragmatism that forged one of the First Order's most feared commanders.

content.title: Resistance
content.description: A young pilot is sent undercover to a remote racing station on the galaxy's frontier, where he uncovers the growing shadow of the First Order in the months leading up to The Force Awakens.

content.title: Episode VII – The Force Awakens
content.description: A young scavenger, a disillusioned stormtrooper, and a droid carrying a critical secret are swept into a conflict between the crumbling Resistance and a new order rising to fill the Empire's place.

content.title: Batuu Bounty Hunters
content.description: A casual mobile game set on the planet Batuu, in which players track down bounty targets across the Black Spire Outpost and surrounding areas of Galaxy's Edge.

content.title: X-wing Fighter
content.description: A browser game adapting events from The Force Awakens, in which players pilot an X-wing on missions against the First Order.

content.title: Canto Bight
content.author: Saladin Ahmed, Rae Carson, Mira Grant, John Jackson Miller
content.description: Four novellas set in the glittering casino city of Canto Bight — weaving interconnected stories of gamblers, grifters, and dreamers on the night Finn and Rose passed through, painting a vivid portrait of the galaxy's gilded inequality.

content.title: Episode VIII – The Last Jedi
content.description: With the Resistance on the run and dwindling fast, desperate gambits are launched on multiple fronts while the connection between a young hero and a fearsome enforcer of the dark side deepens in unexpected ways.

content.title: Droid Repair Bay
content.description: A mobile VR experience set aboard the Resistance flagship. Players repair and maintain the droids of the Resistance fleet in preparation for the fight against the First Order.

content.title: Tales from the Galaxy's Edge
content.description: A VR adventure on the frontier planet of Batuu during the sequel era. Players take the role of a droid technician who gets caught up in a conflict involving the First Order, the Resistance, and the local criminal underworld of Black Spire Outpost.

content.title: Tales from the Galaxy's Edge — Last Call
content.description: A standalone VR sequel set in the cantina of Black Spire Outpost on Batuu. Last Call features new characters and an original story exploring the criminal underworld of the Outer Rim.

content.title: Resistance Reborn
content.author: Rebecca Roanhorse
content.description: In the aftermath of the Resistance's devastating losses, Poe Dameron, Finn, and their allies scramble to rebuild — reaching out to old contacts and new allies across the galaxy before the First Order can extinguish them entirely.

content.title: Galaxy's Edge: Black Spire
content.author: Delilah S. Dawson
content.description: A Resistance spy is sent to the remote outpost world of Batuu — Black Spire Outpost — to recruit allies and find a haven for the Resistance, deep in a frontier town where everyone has something to hide.

content.title: Galaxy's Edge: A Crash of Fate
content.author: Zoraida Córdova
content.description: Two childhood friends are reunited by chance on Batuu — a world of secrets and scoundrels — and must navigate old feelings and new dangers as a simple delivery job spirals into something far more dangerous.

content.title: Episode IX – The Rise of Skywalker
content.description: The Skywalker Saga reaches its conclusion as the Resistance faces an ancient and resurgent evil, forcing allies old and new to come together for one last stand to decide the fate of the galaxy.

content.title: The Last Order
content.author: Kwame Mbalia
content.description: In the aftermath of the Battle of Exegol, a young hero navigates a galaxy reshaping itself after the First Order's fall — confronting remnants of the old regime and discovering what it means to rebuild hope.

content.title: Droid Diaries
content.description: A short-form animated comedy series following R2-D2 and BB-8 through chaotic, laugh-out-loud misadventures during the Sequel era, from lost lightsabers to bounty hunters hot on their trail.

episodes.title: R2-D2 and BB-8's Quest for a New Arm!
R2-D2, BB-8 and Rey's Lightsaber on the Loose!
R2-D2 & BB-8 Save The Millennium Falcon!
Who's Making That Noise in The Millennium Falcon?!
R2-D2 and BB-8's Super Snowy Shenanigans
R2-D2 and BB-8 Chased By A Bounty Hunter?!

content.title: Forces of Destiny
content.description: A collection of animated micro-shorts celebrating acts of courage and kindness from heroes across every era of the Star Wars saga, featuring Ahsoka, Padmé, Leia, Sabine, Rey, Rose, and more.

content.title: Galaxy of Creatures
content.description: An animated documentary-style shorts series following droid SF-R3 as she travels the galaxy on behalf of the Galactic Society of Creature Enthusiasts, learning about beloved Star Wars wildlife from Banthas to Rancors.

content.title: Galactic Pals
content.description: A cheerful animated shorts series following Miree, a caretaker droid, as she nurtures younglings of different Star Wars species — from Ewoks and Wookiees to Jawas and Rancors.

content.title: Unlock!
content.description: The digital companion app for the Unlock!: Star Wars card-based escape room game by Space Cowboys, used to scan cards, validate codes, and access story elements and hints during play.
